Uses of Package
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api

Packages that use me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
Package
Description
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
Main StarCosmetics API Package
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry
Package related to Cosmetic Registration.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Package relating to StarCosmetics Player API.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.cosmetics
Package related to Player Cosmetic Information.
  • Classes in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api used by me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
    Class
    Description
    Completion
    Represents any Completion a player can achieve.
    CompletionCriteria
    Represents Criteria needed to unlock a Cosmetic
    Rarity
    Represents a rarity used in a Cosmetic, Completion, or anything else.
    StarConfig
    Represents the main StarCosmetics Configuration.

    Represents Criteria needed to unlock a Cosmetic

    Represents a rarity used in a Cosmetic, Completion, or anything else.
